title: The Crew Waits for Chopper
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on the crew waits for chopper, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: The Crew Waits for Chopper. Chopper finally accepts the invitation to join Luffy, leaving Kureha and Drum Island with fear and hope mixed together. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Hey, we should go say good bye as well,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: to the Granny Doctor and that huge guy shaped like an acorn...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Just let Chopper alone do that.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's just gonna be a big tear-fest for them...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That doctor might seem cruel on the outside but she's a pretty soft-hearted person on the inside, you know.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Then should we really just go like this?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Yes, as soon as Chopper comes back, we'll go down and sail straight for alabasta!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: that's fine with you too, right vivi?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Yes, especially since a doctor will be coming aboard.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Doctor?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Alright... we'll set up the Popeway in the mean- time.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Yo Luffy, come give me a hand.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Awesome, I didn't even know there was a robbery!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: OPEN!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Is it just me or has the number of my patients decreased...?...?...?...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: They ran away,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: "Ignoring" the warning you gave them...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I see...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: trouble- some bunch...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Doc- Tress!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Dottress!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I have something to tell you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Where've you been, Chopper?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Come down and help carry the cannons outside!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: No, listen! I... I'm going to become a pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I've decided to leave with them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What did you say...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm going out to the seas!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'll be travelling the world as their doctor and crewmate!

summary: This part highlights the crew waits for chopper and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
